name: Klaviyo API
what_it_does: Ecommerce-focused email and SMS marketing platform with deep Shopify/BigCommerce integration, behavioral segmentation, and APIs for event tracking, profile management, and campaign automation.
use_cases: Syncing customer purchase events from agent workflows to Klaviyo
Creating and updating customer profiles with behavioral data
Triggering automated email flows based on agent-detected events
Querying segment membership for targeting decisions
Managing SMS consent and sending transactional SMS
not_for: Pure transactional email without marketing automation needs
Teams not using Shopify, WooCommerce, or similar platforms
best_when: You're running an ecommerce store and need tightly integrated email/SMS marketing driven by purchase and browse behavior.
avoid_when: You're not in ecommerce or need a general-purpose email API without marketing automation.

auth.notes: Private API key for backend operations. Public API key for frontend event tracking. Keys scoped by permissions in dashboard. Simple for agents.

pricing.paid_tiers: Pricing based on contact count: 500 contacts from $20/month, scales with list size
pricing.notes: Pricing is contact-count based which can get expensive for large lists. SMS costs extra. Free plan is genuinely usable for small stores.

performance.rate_limits: Varies by endpoint: typically 75 requests/second with burst allowances

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: JSON API spec compliance with good error detail. Error responses include title, detail, and source fields.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Profile creation is idempotent by email. Event tracking allows deduplication via $event_id.
known_agent_gotchas: API v1/v2 are deprecated - must use v3 (JSON API spec format) which has different structure
Contact-count pricing means agent-created test profiles inflate billing
SMS compliance requirements (opt-in/opt-out) must be handled carefully to avoid carrier blocks
Rate limits apply per account not per key - multiple agents share the same limits
Bulk operations require polling for completion status
